name: Pixel Bang - Pixel Art Shooting Game

reviews.review_description:
A couple of small changes would make a big difference, being able to change the x and y axis of the gun so you can hold it more comfortably and turn off forced to akimo so you can use only one gun if you want

Edit: And there seems to be a bug where the gun shoots perfectly lined up with the sights, but then it starts shooting too low after switching a game or two and going back to the menu :)

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, really appreciated!

reviews.review_description: This is a basic shooting game but still lots of fun. The graphics are old school pixelated but that does not detract from the enjoyment of playing. You play through a series of short levels completing various shooting challenges. I'd say it's definitely worth the price, although it would be nice to have some sort of leaderboard so that I can compare how bad I am to others.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, glad you liked this shooting game!

reviews.review_description: It's a classic game you should have in your library.. Target shooting! You have in your hands two guns and many levels to try. At first it's very easy to shoot at targets.. Then it becomes more and more challenging. Nice game to spend some time and have fun

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, glad you liked this shooting game!

reviews.review_description: I enjoyed the variations of the challenges. Looking forward to and hoping for more stages to be added in the future. Would love to see some different guns like assault rifle or shotguns for any future updates. Thanks

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, really appreciated!

reviews.review_title: A great take on an old arcade classic…
reviews.review_description: This is basically Police Trainer but in VR…. Police Trainer was the bomb and so is this game. Insane mode really pushes you to the limit

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback, really appreciated!

reviews.review_description:
I thought I would just give this game a quick try out for 5 minutes before going on holiday, next thing I know I’m running late. 😆
A good fun game which is surprisingly addictive. 
Recommended.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review, happy you enjoyed this game!

reviews.review_title: Great shooting game while sitting down
reviews.review_description: Great little game for low intensity shooting while sitting down. Great fun and correctly priced.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review, glad you enjoyed this game!

reviews.review_description: Won this in a sort of raffle and so glad I did. Perfect little target shooting game. Ideal for a quick little play when you want to. Easy to lose time though from trying to better your score.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, glad you liked this shooting game!

reviews.review_description: Received it as a gift, really enjoying it. Recommended.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, glad you had fun with this shooting game! Check out more VR games at https://xsgames.co for more fun ;)
